## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Keep it short. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick the ones that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (public or protected API signature)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`composer test`).
- [ ] PHPStan passes (`composer stan`).
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated with a concise entry under the next version.
- [ ] Public / protected signatures untouched (or the Breaking change box is ticked and the rationale is explained below).

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, alternatives you considered, follow-ups out of scope. -->
